headline: Ford and General Motors Want In on the Energy Craze. Which Stock Will Win?
summary: American automakers are pivoting away from electric vehicles to instead capitalize on surging electricity demand.

raw.headline: Ford and General Motors Want In on the Energy Craze. Which Stock Will Win?
raw.summary: American automakers are pivoting away from electric vehicles to instead capitalize on surging electricity demand.

headline: Tesla leads Cars.com's 'Most American' car title yet again, and now tariffs play a part
summary: Tesla's (TSLA) Model 3 and Model Y lead Cars.com's "American-made Index" for the sixth year in a row. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian breaks down the details.

raw.headline: Tesla leads Cars.com's 'Most American' car title yet again, and now tariffs play a part
raw.summary: Tesla's (TSLA) Model 3 and Model Y lead Cars.com's "American-made Index" for the sixth year in a row. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian breaks down the details.

headline: GM Financial to Release Second Quarter 2026 Operating Results
summary: FORT WORTH, Texas, June 23, 2026--GENERAL MOTORS FINANCIAL COMPANY, INC. ("GM Financial" or the "Company") will release its second quarter 2026 operating results on Tuesday, July 21, 2026.

raw.headline: GM Financial to Release Second Quarter 2026 Operating Results

headline: Tesla leads Cars.com's American-Made Index again, even as EV sales slump
summary: For a second time Tesla heads the list of Cars.com's most American-made vehicles, which paradoxically comes as the US EV market it helped build shrinks in a post tax credit world.

raw.headline: Tesla leads Cars.com's American-Made Index again, even as EV sales slump
raw.summary: For a second time Tesla heads the list of Cars.com's most American-made vehicles, which paradoxically comes as the US EV market it helped build shrinks in a post tax credit world.

headline: Is Rivian Automotive Stock A Smart Buy Right Now?
summary: The electric vehicle maker has a promising new vehicle and a mountain of cash to fund its future, but the road to profitability is paved with near-term losses and significant execution risk.

raw.headline: Is Rivian Automotive Stock A Smart Buy Right Now?
raw.summary: The electric vehicle maker has a promising new vehicle and a mountain of cash to fund its future, but the road to profitability is paved with near-term losses and significant execution risk.
